tasks.title: Write a README.md documenting ArchLog (work journal & portfolio platform for Swiss architects): what it does, Electron architecture (main.js, preload.js, src/), and how to run it locally

Expanded README.md with a features table (all 8 views: dashboard, projects, log, portfolio, knowledge, norms, gis, timeline), an AI-analysis section (Anthropic cloud vs. local Ollama), and a detailed Electron architecture section covering main.js (IPC handlers, data persistence, Obsidian vault sync, AI backends), preload.js (contextBridge security model), and src/ (renderer). To verify: open README.md at the repo root and read the new "מה זה ArchLog?" and "ארכיטקטורה (Electron)" sections.
